contexts.previous_row: 0x96DD 0x12 PRINTCLEAR "A MAN CARRYING A BUNDLE OF PAPERS RUSHES UP TO YOU. HE GRABS YOUR ARM DESPERATELY. 'I AM DR. ROMNEY. PLEASE HELP ME GET TO THE SUN KING. IT IS MOST URGENT.'"

0x8372 0x12 PRINTCLEAR "A MAN IN LUNA GREY SHAKES YOUR HANDS. 'WELCOME. SORRY ABOUT YOUR SHIP, BUT THERE ARE A FEW PROBLEMS."
